actual_answer: About the AORUS MASTER 16 series, all models (BZH, BYH, BXH) come with Windows 11 Pro and Windows 11 Home pre-installed, along with UEFI Shell OS. Each features a 16" OLED WQXGA (2560×1600) display with 240Hz refresh rate, G-SYNC®, and Dolby Vision® support. The BZH model is equipped with the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 Laptop GPU, the BYH with RTX 5080, and the BXH with RTX 5070 Ti. All models share the same Intel® Core™ Ultra 9 275HX processor (24 cores, 24 threads, up to 5.4 GHz), up to 64GB DDR5 5600MHz memory, and 1x PCIe Gen5 and 1x PCIe Gen4x4 M.2 SSD slots. They all include a FHD (1080p) IR webcam with built-in array microphone and Windows Hello Face Authentication. Connectivity includes Thunderbolt™5, Thunderbolt™4, HDMI 2.1, USB3.2 Gen2, RJ-45, MicroSD, and audio jack. Audio features 4x 2W speakers with Dolby Atmos® and Smart Amp Technology. The battery is 99Wh Li Polymer with a 330W AC adapter. All models are 2.5kg, 357 x 254 x 23–29.9 mm, and come in Dark Tide color.
